home.heroSubhead: For humans, agents, and everything in between
home.demoBandBody: Turn anything into something people can pay to unlock. From files to APIs to private access, it all works the same way. Your customer pays first, then gets the response instantly.
home.audienceCreatorsBannerAlt: Creator wearing a shirt with the 402 logo, promotional banner for the Creators section.
home.audienceCapabilitiesBody: How 402 fits into real flows—from the first challenge to a completed payment.
home.capabilitiesCard1Description: Return HTTP 402 with machine-readable payment instructions so clients know exactly what to pay and how to retry.
home.capabilitiesCard2Description: Share the same checkout with people on phones and software that pays programmatically—USDC on Base, receipts, and unlock in one flow.
home.creatorsCard1Description: Put a price on a URL. Share it in bios, DMs, or QR codes — buyers tap, pay USDC on Base, and unlock the link.
home.creatorsCard3Description: Gate guides, lessons, or drops behind one payment. Readers pay once for immediate access to what you publish.
home.creatorsCard4Description: Offer single-use unlocks for previews, private pages, or limited drops — no subscription stack required.
home.creatorsCard5Description: Turn posts or threads into checkout moments: clear amount, label, and proof of payment tied to your slug.
home.softwareCard2Description: Sell a paid action, operation, or task.
home.softwareCard4Description: Get paid before a response is created.
home.resourceChargeBlurb: Sell a file, page, link, or digital access
home.capabilityChargeBlurb: Charge for API execution, actions, or compute
home.capDeliveryDirectHelp: Return the final result immediately after payment.
home.capDeliveryProtectedHelp: Proxy the result and hide the origin.
home.capDeliveryAsyncHelp: Return a job receipt first, then the final result later.
home.capabilityTrustBlockedHint: This origin is blocked for execution. Change the endpoint or ask the platform to adjust trust policy.
home.capabilityTrustUnverifiedHint: This origin is not yet verified or allowlisted. Execution may be denied if strict trust mode is enabled — add the host to your allowlist (via the management API) or use a verified domain.
home.capabilityManageIntro: Sign in with the same wallet as your payout address to edit this capability, adjust lifecycle, allowlist the execution host, and see recent jobs.
home.capabilityManageNoReceiver: Missing payout wallet on this resource.
home.capabilityManageNoWallet: No Ethereum wallet found in this browser.
home.capabilityManageWalletMismatch: Connect the wallet that matches your payout address.
home.capabilityManageTrustHelp: If strict trust mode blocks your HTTPS origin, add the execution host here so paid runs can succeed.
home.capabilityManageNoJobs: No jobs yet for this capability.
home.capabilityHealthSubtitle: Aggregated from async jobs for this capability.
home.capabilityNotifySubtitle: When enabled, 402 can email you and/or POST to a webhook when async jobs finish or fail (email uses the same provider as creator receipts when configured on the API).
home.capabilityNotifyOnComplete: Notify when a job completes successfully
home.capabilityNotifyOnFail: Notify when a job fails permanently
home.capabilityOpenFullManageHint: Larger layout for analytics, policy, and notification history.
home.capabilityPolicyCooldownWait: Cooldown active — try again in about {{seconds}}s.
home.capabilityPolicyConcurrencyLimit: Concurrency limit reached; new async jobs are blocked until capacity frees.
home.capabilityWindowVsPrior: Compared to the prior period of the same length (trends in parentheses).
home.capabilityPolicyEditHelp: Limit how often executions start or how many async jobs can run at once. Leave blank for no limit.
home.capabilityPolicyCooldownInvalid: Cooldown must be a positive number of seconds or empty.
home.capabilityPolicyMaxInvalid: Max concurrent jobs must be a positive integer or empty.
home.capabilityPolicyCap24Label: Max execution starts per rolling 24 hours
home.capabilityPolicyCap7Label: Max execution starts per rolling 7 days
home.capabilityPolicyCapInvalid: Execution caps must be positive integers or empty.
home.capabilityPolicyAutoPauseHelp: When enabled, repeated operational failures on async jobs can temporarily pause new runs to protect buyers and sellers.
home.capabilityPolicyAutoPauseInvalid: Auto-pause numbers must be positive integers or empty for defaults.
home.capabilityPolicyManualPauseInvalid: Manual pause must be a valid future ISO timestamp, at most 30 days ahead, or empty.
home.capabilityPolicyExecutionCapBlocked: 24-hour execution cap reached; new runs are blocked until the window rolls.
7-day execution cap reached; new runs are blocked until the window rolls.
home.capabilityNotifyHistoryErrorsHint: Failed rows may include an error on the server; open audit or logs for details.
home.capabilityHistHelp: Paginated async job history with filters. Use Inspect for full job metadata, attempts, and audit samples.
home.capabilityHistEmpty: No rows loaded yet — choose filters and click Apply, or use the failed preset.
home.capabilityDiagNoFailuresWindow: No failed jobs in this window.

home.receiverHint: USDC on Base se enviará aquí
home.deliveryDirectBlurb: Buyer receives the final link immediately after payment.
home.deliveryProtectedBlurb1: Buyer receives a short-lived access link instead of your raw URL.
home.protectedTtlHint: Leave empty for 900 (15 minutes). Allowed range: 60–604800.
home.errorProtectedUrl: Enter a valid http(s) URL for the final destination.
home.errorPostPaymentUrl: Enter a valid http(s) URL for what opens after payment.
home.errorProtectedTtl: TTL must be a whole number of seconds between 60 and 604800.

home.createErrorNetwork: Error de red: verifique su conexión o configuración de API.
home.why402Tagline: Not another storefront, cart, or hosted checkout.
home.why402Lead: Stripe and similar stacks excel when you have SKUs, tax regions, subscriptions, and a buyer who expects a long-lived merchant relationship. Much of the internet does not work that way.
home.why402Examples:
A table at a market.
A link in a TikTok bio.
A QR code on a flyer.
A one-time service.
An API call.
A machine action.
home.why402Built: 402 is built for pay-first access and pay-first execution.
home.why402Closer: One commerce layer for links, downloads, gated pages, API calls, and agent workflows—USDC on Base, machine-readable HTTP 402, and humans using the same checkout.
home.why402EverydayBody: Sell physical goods, local items, event entry, one-off services, tips, and simple payments without needing a full storefront.
home.why402CreatorBody: Sell content, drops, downloads, private access, and social-first offers anywhere a link or QR code can go.
home.why402MachineBody: Monetize API calls, actions, and programmable access with the same core payment rail.
home.howItWorksBody: Comparte tu enlace de pago o QR. Los compradores pagan USDC en base; los fondos van a la billetera del recurso y llegan a su página de éxito para ese slug.
demo.heroSubtitle: This is what 402 returns after payment.
demo.payoffFoot: Returned directly over HTTP after payment.
demo.flow4Outcome: → Receives the JSON payload in the response body.
demo.why3: A paid resource returned directly over HTTP.
howItWorks.lede: You define amount, label, and payout wallet. Someone pays USDC on Base through your link or QR. Funds go straight to that wallet. 402 verifies the payment so everyone sees the same result.
howItWorks.step1Body: Enter an amount, a short label, and the Base address where you want USDC to land. 402 gives you a link and QR code for that exact request.
howItWorks.step2Body: Drop the link in chat, email, or a bio. Show the QR in person. Buyers pay from their own wallet. They do not need a 402 account.
howItWorks.step3Body: USDC arrives in your wallet. 402 watches the payment, matches it to your link, and marks the request complete when it checks out.
howItWorks.underBody1: The transfer is recorded on the blockchain as USDC on Base. It settles in the wallet encoded in your link, not in a 402 balance.
howItWorks.underBody2: 402 detects that transfer, compares amount and details against your request, and only then records it as paid.
howItWorks.underBody3: Until verification succeeds, the request stays unpaid. Nothing is assumed.
howItWorks.whyBody1: Stripe routes money through merchant accounts and its own infrastructure. Venmo and similar apps expect both sides inside the same product. A plain wallet QR usually does not pin amount, label, and a clean receipt for one sale.
howItWorks.whyBody2: 402 is lighter. No accounts to open here. No Stripe dependency. No platform holding your funds. You fill a few fields, share one link, and buyers pay USDC on Base directly into the address you chose.
howItWorks.trustBody1: We confirm payments instead of guessing. Status updates only after verification lines up with the request you created.
howItWorks.trustBody2: Wrong amount or wrong link means it will not show as paid for that sale.
howItWorks.trustBody3: Each link is its own request, so separate payments stay separate.
howItWorks.closing: Money moves wallet to wallet. We keep the record straight.
legal.termsStub: Full terms will be published here.
legal.privacyStub: Full privacy policy will be published here.

pay.session.watchingHint: We watch this page for your payment—keep it open until access is ready.
pay.session.patienceHint: This usually takes a few seconds. You can leave this tab in the background.
pay.session.autoOpenFallback: If nothing opens automatically, tap Open resource.
pay.session.loadDeliveryFailed: Could not load your access yet (HTTP {{status}}).
pay.session.phase.connectingSubtitle: Setting up a secure payment session for this item.
pay.session.phase.awaitingSubtitle: When you are ready, pay with your wallet. We will pick it up from here.
pay.session.phase.detectedSubtitle: We are confirming your transfer on the network.
pay.session.phase.failedSubtitle: This session could not continue. You can start fresh below.
pay.slugMissing: Falta un slug de pago en la URL.
pay.resourceNotFound: Recurso no encontrado o no disponible.
pay.loadFailed: No se pudo cargar este pago. Comprueba tu conexión y vuelve a intentarlo.
pay.attemptInvalid: Este enlace de pago no es válido o ya no está disponible.
pay.attemptSlugMismatch: Este enlace de pago no coincide con este producto.
pay.createAttemptFailed: No se pudo crear el intento de pago
pay.capabilityPolicy.rateLimited: This capability is temporarily limiting how often it can run. Wait a bit and try again—the seller set a cooldown between executions.
pay.capabilityPolicy.maxConcurrency: This capability already has the maximum number of async runs in progress. Try again shortly.
pay.capabilityPolicy.executionCap: This capability is temporarily unavailable because it reached the seller’s usage limit for this period. Try again later.
pay.capabilityPolicy.temporarilyPaused: This capability is temporarily paused (by the seller or after repeated failures). Try again after the pause window.
pay.capabilityPolicy.disabled: This capability is disabled and cannot accept payments or runs right now.
pay.capabilityPolicy.archived: This capability is archived and cannot accept new payments.
pay.capabilityPolicy.trustBlocked: This capability cannot run from its current endpoint trust state. You can still see the listing, but execution is blocked until the seller fixes origin trust.
pay.capabilityPolicy.endpointInvalid: This capability’s endpoint is not configured correctly, so execution cannot proceed.
pay.capabilityPolicy.generic: This capability cannot start a run right now due to seller policy or safeguards. If it should work, try again later.
pay.capabilityPolicy.catalogBlocked: This capability is listed, but new payments or runs are not available right now due to seller policy or safeguards.
pay.payBaseUnavailable: Pay on Base no está disponible para este recurso (consulte la dirección de pago y USDC on Base).
pay.metaMaskUnavailable: El pago de MetaMask no está disponible para este recurso (consulte la dirección de pago y el USDC en Base).
pay.pasteTxHash: Pega el hash de la transacción desde tu billetera o explorador de bloques.
pay.txHashInvalid: Eso no parece un hash de transacción válido (se espera 0x seguido de 64 caracteres hexadecimales).
pay.freeUnlockingSubtitle: No payment required. We are preparing your access.
pay.deliveryQrCaption: Scan to open on another device
pay.verifySecondaryLink: Already paid? Verify with transaction hash
pay.autoDetectFooter: We’ll detect your Base USDC transfer automatically.
pay.verifyBrief: Create a payment link, then paste your transaction hash if you need to verify manually.
pay.advancedInstructionDetail: Send {{amount}} {{currency}} on Base to the recipient for this link. We watch for the USDC transfer automatically; use verification here if status hasn’t updated yet (for example right after MetaMask or a block explorer confirms the transaction).
pay.walletLinksUnavailableShort: Wallet deep link isn’t available for this resource — use verification below once you’ve sent USDC on Base.
pay.inProgressShort: After you send USDC, open payment status — or verify with a transaction hash.
pay.title: pagar
pay.subtitle: Envía USDC en Base desde tu cartera: detectamos la transferencia automáticamente. Usa Avanzado solo si necesitas verificar con un hash de transacción.
pay.openPayWithoutLink: Abrir página de pago sin este enlace
pay.desktopQrCaption: Scan with your phone to pay in the Base app
pay.desktopErrNoWallet: Install a browser wallet (MetaMask or Coinbase Wallet), or use Copy payment link / QR to pay on your phone.
pay.desktopErrRejected: Request was cancelled in your wallet.
pay.desktopCopyFailed: Could not copy to the clipboard.
pay.payWithWalletHint: Opens your wallet with Base, USDC, amount, and payee prefilled. Works with Coinbase Wallet, MetaMask, the Base app, and other EIP-681 compatible wallets.
pay.walletLinksUnavailable: Los enlaces de billetera no están disponibles (no hay dirección de pago en Base para este recurso). Utilice Avanzado para verificar con un hash de transacción.
pay.inProgressBody: Después de enviar USDC a Base, abra el estado de pago. Puede tocar Pagar en Base o Pagar en MetaMask nuevamente si necesita volver a abrir su billetera.
pay.showAdvanced: Avanzado: verificar con hash de transacción
pay.advancedTitle: Avanzado: verificar con hash de transacción
pay.advancedInstruction: Envíe {{amount}} {{currency}} en Base al destinatario de este enlace. El servidor detecta USDC on Base automáticamente cuando abre la página de estado; use este formulario solo si necesita forzar la verificación con un hash de transacción conocido (por ejemplo, de MetaMask o un explorador de bloques).
pay.devMockBody: Con <mono>X402_MOCK_VERIFY=true</mono> en el trabajador, la verificación simulada se salta la cadena (no para producción).
pay.statusApiNote: Seguimos comprobando hasta que se confirme tu transferencia de USDC en Base.
success.capabilityAsyncPending: This paid capability is asynchronous: you have a job receipt first. The final execution result is not ready yet — use the poll URL from the payload when your integration supports it.
success.capability.subtitleDirect: 402 ran the seller endpoint once and returned the outcome below. This is the live result for this payment.
success.capability.subtitleProtected: 402 does not expose the seller URL in your browser. Open the protected proxy to fetch the result server-side.
success.capability.subtitleAsync: Payment is confirmed. A background job is running (or queued); the final result is not ready until the job completes.
success.capability.resultPageHint: Use the dedicated view for execution status, previews, retrieval, expiration, and your receipt.
success.capability.asyncExplain: Async capabilities run after payment. This page refreshes job status automatically until it finishes or fails.
success.capability.jobFailedGeneric: The job failed. Your payment is still recorded; check the receipt or contact the seller.
success.capability.pollHint: Status updates every few seconds until the job completes or fails.
success.capability.previewOnlyLarge: Only a preview is stored inline; the upstream response was too large to retain in full.
success.capability.resultExpired: The full stored result has expired and is no longer retrievable.
success.capability.resultDeleted: The full stored result was removed and is no longer available.
success.capability.technicalHidden: Technical JSON is hidden by default — use the button below if you need it.
capabilityResult.pageSubtitle: Execution status, what is stored, and how to retrieve it — without hiding limits.
capabilityResult.bookmarkHint: Bookmark this page to revisit while the result remains available.
capabilityResult.missingRoute: Missing slug or job id in the URL.
capabilityResult.slugMismatch: This job belongs to “{{jobSlug}}” but the URL says “{{routeSlug}}”.
capabilityResult.retryScheduledLine: A retry is scheduled. Next attempt: {{at}}.
capabilityResult.failedGeneric: Execution failed. Your payment is still recorded — see the receipt block if available.
capabilityResult.expiredExplain: The run finished, but the stored full result is past its retention window and can no longer be retrieved.
capabilityResult.deletedExplain: The stored result was removed and is no longer available.
capabilityResult.notStoredExplain: The run finished, but no durable full result was kept (preview may still appear if offered).
capabilityResult.previewOnlyExplain: Only a preview is retained; there is no full stored body to download.
capabilityResult.noRetrieval: No retrieval action is available for this outcome.
capabilityResult.receiptUnavailable: Receipt could not be reloaded (HTTP {{status}}). You can still follow job status above.
capabilityResult.receiptNeedAttempt: Add ?attemptId=… to this page’s URL to reload the receipt from your payment.
capabilityResult.lifecycle.result_availa: Complete — full result can be retrieved
pay.capabilityResult.subtitle: Track execution, previews, retrieval, and retention on a dedicated page you can revisit.
pay.capabilityOutcome.subtitle: One place for execution status, result availability, receipt, and next steps — every delivery mode.
capabilityOutcome.pageSubtitle: What you bought, what ran, and what you can still access — in one view.
capabilityOutcome.bookmarkHint: Bookmark this page while your attempt remains valid.
capabilityOutcome.missingRoute: Missing slug or attempt id in the URL.
capabilityOutcome.noOutcomeBlock: Outcome metadata is not available for this response yet.
capabilityOutcome.protectedCta: Run this capability through the 402 proxy (server-side execution).

home.capabilityNotifyWebhookReady: Webhook channel: URL looks configured for delivery.
home.capabilityNotifyWebhookIncomplete: Webhook channel: enable the toggle and enter an HTTPS URL for delivery.
home.capabilityNotifyTestFailed: Could not run test (check channel configuration).
home.capabilityNotifyHealthLine: State: {{health}} · failed rows in view: {{failed}} · pending: {{pending}}
success.capability.unifiedOutcomeHint: See execution, retention, receipt, and links in one buyer-facing outcome page.
success.subtitle.errorNoAttempt: No pudimos leer este intento del trabajador. Consulta el enlace o inténtalo de nuevo.
success.subtitle.checking: Comprobando su intento de pago con el servidor…
success.subtitle.paid: Su pago fue confirmado y este intento se marca como pagado.
success.subtitle.payment_required: Esta página comprueba el servidor cada pocos segundos. Complete la transferencia desde la página de pago o use Avanzado allí si necesita enviar un hash de transacción.
success.subtitle.pending: Esta página comprueba el servidor cada pocos segundos. Completa la transferencia o espera la confirmación.
success.subtitle.failed: Este intento no se completó correctamente. Inicie un nuevo pago desde la página de pago si aún necesita acceso.
success.subtitle.expired: Este intento ya no es válido. Crea un nuevo intento desde la página de pago.
success.subtitle.created: El intento se acaba de crear y aún no está listo para el pago.
success.subtitle.default: El estado lo informa el trabajador. Si esto parece incorrecto, actualice o comuníquese con el soporte.
success.loadAttemptError: No se pudo cargar el intento de pago
success.slugMismatch: El slug de ruta <slug1>{{routeSlug}}</slug1> no coincide con el slug de intento <slug2>{{attemptSlug}}</slug2>. Confíe en la fila de intentos a continuación.
success.footnoteTruth: La verdad viene sólo de <mono>GET /api/payment-attempt/:id</mono>. Los indicadores de cadena de consulta no se utilizan como comprobante de pago.
success.missingSubtitle: Esta página necesita un <mono1>attemptId</mono1> del flujo x402 (por ejemplo, <mono2>/success/demo-001?attemptId=…</mono2>). Sin él, no podemos mostrar el estado de pago verificado.
legacy.title: Sesión de pago heredada de Coinbase
legacy.subtitle: Flujo anterior usando <mono1>/api/payment-session</mono1>. No relacionado con intentos de pago x402; se muestra solo cuando <mono2>sessionId</mono2> está presente.
legacy.loadError: No se pudo cargar la sesión de pago
legacy.footnote: Solo estado basado en webhook; no lo trate como un intento x402 verdadero.
